body:
## Dealix Wave 3 — make the repo sellable, deliverable, provable, protected

This wave turns the repo into a launch-ready **Saudi-first AI Business Operating System** with **Dealix Command Sprint** as the first commercial wedge.

> **Note on origin:** the original instruction was to `unzip dealix_full_company_execution_pack.zip` and run an apply script. That pack is **not present in this environment**, so every deliverable was **reconstructed natively** from the spec and **mapped onto existing repo conventions** (reusing `docs/governance`, `docs/delivery`, `docs/growth`, `docs/sales`, `os/` templates, the existing verify-script chain).

### Dealix identity (Platform Truth)
- `docs/00_platform_truth/`: `PLATFORM_TRUTH.md` (Saudi AI Business OS; Command Sprint = wedge; the "Dealix is NOT" list), `MODULE_STATUS.md` (mirror of the readiness matrix), `LAUNCH_CONTROL_TOWER.md` (daily go/no-go), `CTA_MAP.md` (one-CTA-per-page map).
- `docs/05_founder/DEALIX_EXECUTION_BOARD.md` (daily rhythm + 30-day targets).

### Website core (`frontend/` Next.js 15, bilingual AR/EN, one CTA each)
`/platform` · `/command-sprint` · `/business-os` · `/security` · `/industries` · `/start`. New shared primitives under `components/wave3/` (`PrimaryCta`, `MarketingShell`, `Section`, `Disclaimer`).

### Free tools v1 (`/tools/*`)
Business OS Score · Proof Gap Audit · Revenue Leakage Calculator (educational disclaimer) · AI Governance Checklist. **Client-side deterministic scoring** (`lib/wave3/scoring.ts`) + **governed lead capture** (`lib/wave3/leadCapture.ts` — whitelisted fields, `hold_stage:false`, never auto-send). Each outputs Score, Top 3 gaps, Recommended OS, one next-step CTA, safe disclaimer.

### Growth OS (data-driven: 2 templates + 3 data files → 15 pages)
5 sector pages `/industries/[sector]` + 10 answer pages `/answers/[slug]`, each routing its single CTA to Business OS Score / Diagnostic / Command Sprint. Growth docs in `docs/06_growth/` + `reports/growth/weekly_growth_brief.md`.

### Sales kit (`sales/`)
`COMMAND_SPRINT_ONE_PAGER`, `DIAGNOSTIC_SCRIPT`, `OBJECTION_LIBRARY` (CRM / agency / chatbot / price / data / etc.), `PROPOSAL_TEMPLATE`, `FOLLOW_UP_SEQUENCE`, `PARTNER_ONE_PAGER`.

### Delivery factory & proof (`customers/_template/`)
12 files `00_intake … 11_upsell_recommendation`, each with the 9 governed fields (source · evidence · assumption · confidence · recommendation · approval_required · next_action · owner · due_date) + 7-day SLA + `10_proof_pack.md` proof path.

### Governance
`docs/governance/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md` (forbidden claims AR/EN + safe replacements) and an expanded `FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS.md` (no auto-send / cold WhatsApp / scraping / guaranteed revenue / training on customer data / public case study without approval; human approval for external actions).

### Launch gates (verification)
5 dependency-free Python gates (`scripts/verify_dealix_positioning|cta_map|module_status|growth_assets|launch_readiness.py`, negation-aware so safe "no cold WhatsApp" copy passes) + a Next.js content guard (`frontend/scripts/verify_wave3_content.mjs`) + `make launch-verify` + a least-privilege (`contents: read`) CI workflow.

### Verification results
| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `verify_dealix_positioning` | ✅ PASS |
| `verify_dealix_cta_map` | ✅ PASS |
| `verify_dealix_module_status` | ✅ PASS (32 services valid) |
| `verify_dealix_growth_assets` | ✅ PASS (5 sectors, 10 answers) |
| `verify_dealix_launch_readiness` | ✅ **PRIVATE_LAUNCH_READY** |
| frontend content guard | ✅ PASS |
| `npm run typecheck` | ✅ PASS |
| `npm run build` | ✅ PASS (all Wave 3 routes) |
| `make env-check` | ✅ PASS |
| `security_smoke.py` | ⚠️ FAIL — **pre-existing**, see below |

### Known blockers / follow-ups (see `reports/launch/launch_blockers.md`)
- **OPEN-1 (pre-existing, not this wave):** `security_smoke.py` flags 17 fake-secret patterns in **existing** test fixtures/docs (e.g. `tests/test_agent_observability_integration.py`, `docs/launch/DEALIX_LAUNCH_NOW_BUNDLE.md`). No Wave 3 file is implicated.
- `/pricing` still uses the authenticated `AppLayout` shell (CTA map declares it; shell swap deferred to avoid build risk).
- Public nav not extended with new links (avoided destabilizing the shared shell); pages reachable directly/via internal links.
- Legacy `docs/sales-kit/dealix_onepager.md` contradicts Platform Truth (auto-reply "without human intervention", CRM framing) — reconcile separately.
- `make prod-verify` / `npm run test` not run to green here (need services / heavier) — run in CI before public launch.

### Hard rules honored
No guaranteed-revenue claims · no auto-send · no cold WhatsApp / LinkedIn automation / scraping / blast · no fake proof / scarcity · one main CTA per page · every growth asset routes to Score / Diagnostic / Command Sprint · every paid customer has a delivery folder + proof-pack path.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01WWdXt4mhD4DGV8eRUiCG6y

---

…ates

Native reconstruction of the launch layer (pack zip not present in this
environment) mapped onto existing repo conventions:

- Platform Truth: docs/00_platform_truth (truth, module-status, control tower,
  CTA map) + docs/05_founder execution board
- Website Core: Next.js pages /platform /command-sprint /business-os /security
  /industries /start (one CTA each, bilingual AR/EN)
- Free Tools v1: Business OS Score, Proof Gap Audit, Revenue Leakage (educational
  disclaimer), AI Governance Checklist — client-side scoring + governed lead capture
- Growth OS: 5 sector pages + 10 answer pages (data-driven), growth docs
- Sales Kit: 6 founder-ready files in sales/
- Delivery Factory: customers/_template 12 files with the 9 governed fields + 7-day SLA
- Governance: CLAIMS_REGISTER + expanded FORBIDDEN_ACTIONS
- Verification Gates: 5 verify_dealix_*.py + frontend content guard + Makefile
  launch-verify target + least-privilege CI workflow

Verification: all 5 launch gates PASS (verdict PRIVATE_LAUNCH_READY), frontend
typecheck + build green, env-check OK. Pre-existing security_smoke fixture matches
logged in reports/launch/launch_blockers.md.

commits.messageBody:
…lib/ rule

The generic Python .gitignore 'lib/' rule silently excluded
frontend/src/lib/wave3/{scoring,routes,leadCapture}.ts, breaking the
frontend typecheck and Docker build in CI (modules unresolved) while passing
locally. Force-add the files and add a scoped negation so it can't recur.

title: Dealix Wave 3 — Full Company OS foundation & launch gates
